mapper.select: SELECT r.roomId, target.userId AS targetUserId, target.nickname AS targetNickname, target.profileImage AS targetProfileImage, lm.messageId AS lastMessageId, lm.content AS lastMessage, DATE_FORMAT(lm.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastMessageAt FROM directChatRooms r JOIN directChatParticipants me ON me.roomId = r.roomId AND me.userId = #{userId} JOIN directChatParticipants other ON other.roomId = r.roomId AND other.userId != #{userId} JOIN users target ON target.userId = other.userId LEFT JOIN directChatMessages lm ON lm.messageId = ( SELECT dcm.messageId FROM directChatMessages dcm WHERE dcm.roomId = r.roomId ORDER BY dcm.createdAt DESC, dcm.messageId DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE r.isActive = 1 AND ( me.leftAt IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM directChatMessages visibleMessage WHERE visibleMessage.roomId = r.roomId AND visibleMessage.createdAt > me.leftAt ) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(lm.createdAt, r.updatedAt, r.createdAt) DESC, r.roomId DESC

SELECT r.roomId, target.userId AS targetUserId, target.nickname AS targetNickname, target.profileImage AS targetProfileImage, lm.messageId AS lastMessageId, lm.content AS lastMessage, DATE_FORMAT(lm.createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS lastMessageAt FROM directChatRooms r JOIN directChatParticipants me ON me.roomId = r.roomId AND me.userId = #{userId} JOIN directChatParticipants other ON other.roomId = r.roomId AND other.userId != #{userId} JOIN users target ON target.userId = other.userId LEFT JOIN directChatMessages lm ON lm.messageId = ( SELECT dcm.messageId FROM directChatMessages dcm WHERE dcm.roomId = r.roomId ORDER BY dcm.createdAt DESC, dcm.messageId DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE r.roomId = #{roomId}
SELECT p1.roomId FROM directChatParticipants p1 JOIN directChatParticipants p2 ON p2.roomId = p1.roomId WHERE p1.userId = #{userId} AND p2.userId = #{targetUserId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE directChatRooms SET isActive = 1, updatedAt = NOW() WHERE roomId = #{roomId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO directChatRooms( createdAt, updatedAt ) VALUES( NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM directChatRooms r JOIN directChatParticipants p ON p.roomId = r.roomId AND p.userId = #{userId} WHERE r.roomId = #{roomId} AND r.isActive = 1

SELECT recent.messageId, recent.roomId, recent.userId, recent.nickname, recent.profileImage, recent.content, recent.messageType, recent.createdAt FROM ( SELECT dcm.messageId, dcm.roomId, dcm.userId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, dcm.content, dcm.messageType, dcm.createdAt FROM directChatMessages dcm JOIN users u ON u.userId = dcm.userId JOIN directChatParticipants viewer ON viewer.roomId = dcm.roomId AND viewer.userId = #{userId} WHERE dcm.roomId = #{roomId} AND ( viewer.leftAt IS NULL OR dcm.createdAt > viewer.leftAt ) ORDER BY dcm.createdAt DESC, dcm.messageId DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) recent ORDER BY recent.createdAt ASC, recent.messageId ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO directChatMessages( roomId, userId, content, messageType ) VALUES( #{roomId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{messageType} )
mapper.select: SELECT dcm.messageId, dcm.roomId, dcm.userId, u.nickname, u.profileImage, dcm.content, dcm.messageType, dcm.createdAt FROM directChatMessages dcm JOIN users u ON u.userId = dcm.userId WHERE dcm.messageId = #{messageId}
